Name: Average time for Unmatched + Unmatched across all process variants where it occurs
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Unmatched + Unmatched and the end of the case

Name: Total time spent in Unmatched + Unmatched compared to the total time of Accepted + In Progress within the same case
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Unmatched + Unmatched and the end of the case

Name: Minimum time for Unmatched + Unmatched in variants that transition directly to Queued + Awaiting Assignment
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Unmatched + Unmatched' and activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment'

Name: Average time from Unmatched + Unmatched to Completed + Resolved in cases where both activities occur
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Unmatched + Unmatched' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Total time between Unmatched + Unmatched and the next occurrence of Accepted + In Progress
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Unmatched + Unmatched' and activity 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Average cycle time of Unmatched + Unmatched when it appears as the first activity in a variant
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Unmatched + Unmatched and the end of the case

Name: Minimum time for Unmatched + Unmatched in variants that include Completed + In Call later in the sequence
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Unmatched + Unmatched' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Total time from Unmatched + Unmatched to Completed + In Call, considering only variants where Completed + In Call follows Unmatched + Unmatched
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Unmatched + Unmatched' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Average time for Unmatched + Unmatched grouped by country, leveraging the geographical context described in the VINST incident management system
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Unmatched + Unmatched' and the end of case grouped by the last value of organization country

Name: Elapsed time between Unmatched + Unmatched and Accepted + Wait - User in shared variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Unmatched + Unmatched' and activity 'Accepted + Wait - User'

Name: Time from Unmatched + Unmatched to Completed + Closed in end-to-end variants containing both activities
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Unmatched + Unmatched' and activity 'Completed + Closed'

Name: Average time for Unmatched + Unmatched in variants that do not contain Completed + In Call, to contrast with variants that do
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Unmatched + Unmatched' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call does not occur

Name: Total time spent in Unmatched + Unmatched versus Completed + In Call within identical process variants
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Unmatched + Unmatched' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Minimum time for Unmatched + Unmatched preceding any wait-state activity (e.g., Accepted + Wait - Customer, Accepted + Wait - Vendor, or Accepted + Wait - Implementation)
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Unmatched + Unmatched' and activity 'Accepted + Wait - Customer'

Name: Cycle time of Unmatched + Unmatched when followed immediately by another Unmatched + Unmatched event in the same case
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Unmatched + Unmatched' and activity 'Unmatched + Unmatched'
